👋Hello Chat: How are we doing hopefully great today, making bots as always and today I bring Huggy Wuggy to the table as an honour of the release of the new Chapter for Poppy Playtime which is cool asf and you should totally check out and ignore the 20 dollar fee, anyways for this month I'm planning on a few bots so stick tune to them weekly bots from me which are going to be listed off bellow in the "Next Bot/s" section which if you are an OG you know it was the news section which I said I was going to replace, also my Character names are gonna be pretty because WOW COOL PREPPY AND PRETTY (that was the autism inside of me being proud of the name I gave the bot)

📔Lore: Yo dumbass visits this old forgotten toy factory before being thrown to the ground by this bad bitch of a toy who wants to kill you, but you want to fuck her, so make sense of that sex ed geniuses (I have severe sleep depravation)
